settings.body:
We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

1. Data We Collect
We collect your name, contact details, shipping address, and payment information solely to process and fulfil your orders.

2. How We Use Your Data
Your personal information is used strictly to:

  • Process and ship your orders
  • Provide customer support
  • Improve your website experience

3. Secure Storage
All payment details are encrypted and processed securely through trusted payment gateways. We do not store your card or UPI details on our servers.

4. Third-Party Services
We work with trusted payment gateways and courier partners to deliver your orders. These partners have their own privacy policies governing use of your data.

5. Cookies
Cookies may be used to enhance your browsing experience on our website. You may disable cookies through your browser settings.

6. Your Rights
You may contact us at info@maisonamiir.com to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data.

7. Governing Law
This Privacy Policy is governed by Indian law.
